response_body.response:
got it. 6am workouts, vegetarian diet — i've got that locked in. this'll shape your meal timing and recovery plan.

what are you working on right now? are you running a fitmax schedule already, or starting fresh?

variant: what should i eat after my workout?

request.message: what should i eat after my workout?

response_body.response: post-workout, you want protein within 60 min of finishing. at 78kg bodyweight, you're targeting roughly 78g protein daily, so aim for 25-35g in that window. best vegetarian options: greek yogurt with granola, cottage cheese, tofu scramble, lentil pasta, or a pea/soy protein shake. if you're tracking, a palm-sized portion of protein + a fist of carbs works too. since you're done at like 7am, you could eat this right after or fold it into breakfast within that hour.

products.name: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein
products.description: 24g whey isolate per scoop — third-party tested, low-cost per gram.

variant: and when should i eat it?

request.message: and when should i eat it?

response_body.response:
timing: eat within 60 minutes after your 6am workout finishes. so if you're done by 6:45am, aim for breakfast by 7:45am latest. protein + carbs together (greek yogurt + granola, tofu scramble + toast, protein shake + banana). this window is when your muscles are primed to absorb amino acids, so don't skip it.
